name: Jibillat ibn Ali
title: Brave Shaybani
shortDescription: A brave warrior of Kufa who fought alongside Ali (AS) in Siffin and sacrificed his life for Hussain (AS) on Ashura.
fullStory:
Jibillat ibn Ali al-Shaybani was a renowned and brave Shia from Kufa. He had a brilliant history of supporting the Ahl al-Bayt and had fought shoulder to shoulder with Amir al-Mu'minin Ali (AS) against Muawiyah in the Battle of Siffin. Jibillat was someone who combined insight with bravery.

After Muslim ibn Aqeel's uprising in Kufa, Jibillat was one of his staunch supporters. But after Muslim's martyrdom and Ibn Ziyad's strict control over the city, he went into hiding. When he heard of Imam Hussain's (AS) presence in Karbala, he bravely escaped the siege of Kufa and reached Karbala.

On the day of Ashura, Jibillat, with a spirit full of epic faith, lined up alongside the other companions of Imam Hussain (AS). He was an old but experienced warrior who had learned to wield his sword in the path of truth from his master Ali (AS).

With the start of the cowardly, all-out attack by Umar Sa'd's army (the first attack), Jibillat ibn Ali, along with other brave Kufans, manfully stood against the onslaught of arrows and spears.

Finally, this veteran soldier of Wilayah, after years of jihad in the path of truth, fell to the ground during that very first attack on Ashura, achieving his long-held wish of martyrdom alongside the household of Muhammad (PBUH).
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلى جَبَلَةَ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الشَّيْبانِيِّ...
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Jibillat ibn Ali al-Shaybani.
